# REQ-FR-260011: MVP Search Controls and Query Transparency

- Class: FR
- Status: Accepted
- Date: 2026-04-17
- Source decision: E1, E2 (Search model and discoverability)

## Requirement

The frontend shall provide MVP search controls using simple label search and lightweight structured filters, with visual controls as the primary interaction and a read-only textual query summary that reflects active search state.

## Rationale

Users need fast filtering with low complexity while still understanding the effective query state driving graph results.

## Scope Notes

- In scope for MVP: label search, lightweight structured filters, visual control-based search UI, read-only textual query summary.
- Out of scope for this requirement: full query-builder authoring UI and editable textual query mode.

## Verification

- End-to-end checks confirm label search and structured filters modify result scope.
- UI checks confirm query summary updates correctly with active controls.
- Regression checks confirm search remains operable without requiring textual query editing.

## Traceability

- Related ADRs: ADR-260016
- Related backlog items: BI-260013
